overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a Mediterranean-style palace garden during a vibrant sunset. The character descends stone stairs and traverses cobblestone paths past NPCs, statues, and terraces with scenic mountain views.

events.description: character descends stone stairs and turns right around palace corner

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking down stone stairs from palace entrance, turning right along the building wall

entered.detail: wide stone staircase descending from palace entrance
tall stone wall of Mediterranean-style palace with decorative columns
ornate stone balustrade with decorative urns
vibrant orange and red sunset sky
large stone urn on pedestal beside stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt descending wide stone stairs from a Mediterranean palace during golden hour. The camera follows from behind as he turns right along the palace wall, with ornate stone railings and decorative urns visible. The vibrant orange sunset illuminates distant mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow garden path between stone walls

events.description: character slows slightly while approaching group of NPCs standing on path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along narrow cobblestone path, passing a woman with two children standing against the wall

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress standing with two children, watching Geralt pass

entered.detail: irregular stone cobblestones forming garden walkway
tall weathered stone wall covered in patches of greenery
mature oak tree with spreading branches overhanging the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow cobblestone path bordered by a stone wall on the right and open garden on the left. A woman with two children stands against the wall, allowing him to pass. Large trees overhang the path while the palace wall recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open garden path with sunset views

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along winding garden path with scenic views of sunset over mountains

entered.detail: lush green shrubs lining the path edge

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider garden area with full view of the orange sunset sky. Geralt walks past mature trees and lush bushes while the stone wall disappears behind him. The cobblestone path winds through landscaped greenery with distant mountains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: terraced overlook with statues and torches

events.description: path widens into formal terrace with stone statues and lit torches

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking across stone terrace, passing statues and torch-lit areas with palace building on right

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near palace entrance

entered.detail: broad paved terrace with patterned stone tiles
classical stone statue on pedestal silhouetted against sunset
burning torch in iron holder illuminating the terrace
grand palace facade with arched windows and columns

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a formal stone terrace with classical statues and burning torches. Geralt walks across the patterned tiles with the grand palace building visible to his right. The area is more open with scattered NPCs visible near the palace entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace overlook with tower and mountain panorama

events.description: character slows to a stop at terrace edge to view sunset over mountains

agents.ego_description: Geralt slowing to a stop at terrace railing, looking out at sunset over mountain valley

entered.detail: tall stone tower with pointed roof and lit windows
row of stone archways forming terrace balustrade

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the terrace edge overlooking a vast mountain valley bathed in orange sunset light. A tall stone tower rises to the left while stone arches line the terrace railing. He slows to a stop, taking in the panoramic view of the mountains and the setting sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed corridors of a Mediterranean palace out toward a vast, open mountain vista during a vibrant sunset. It begins with Geralt descending wide stone stairs and turning along an ornate palace wall adorned with decorative urns, while the orange light of the golden hour illuminates distant peaks. As he moves forward, the scene shifts from the palace walls to a narrow cobblestone path shaded by overhanging trees and populated by passing NPCs, before opening further into a lush garden of mature trees and landscaped greenery. The path then leads onto a formal stone terrace featuring classical statues and burning torches, with the grand palace building receding to the right. Finally, the camera follows Geralt to the terrace edge, where the view expands into a panoramic mountain valley framed by stone arches and a tall tower under the glow of the setting sun.
